overview.description: The iShares Core U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF (AGG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Aggregate index. The fund tracks an index of US investment-grade bonds. The market-weighted index includes Treasuries, agencies, CMBS, ABS and investment-grade corporates. AGG was launched on Sep 22, 2003 and is issued by BlackRock.
